title: headlamp-plugin: Spawn .cmd shims through a shell on Windows
author: skoeva

findings.description: Glob pattern 'src/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}' passed as arg with shell:true on Windows — cmd.exe does not expand globs. i18next-scanner handles it, but worth a comment for future maintainers.
winShell boolean defined once and reused consistently at all five call sites.
Fixes the regression from PR #4850 which added .cmd suffix but omitted shell: true.
